content: Advanced RAG Pipeline Testing Document This document tests the complete RAG pipeline functionality including: 1. PDF Document Processing and Text Extraction - Automatic parsing of PDF content - Text normalization and cleaning 2. Semantic Chunking and Indexing - Intelligent document segmentation - Vector embedding generation using transformer models - Real-time indexing into the search engine 3. Multi-Modal Search Capabilities - Semantic search using neural embeddings - Keyword-based exact matching - Hybrid search combining both approaches 4. Performance and Scalability Testing - Response time measurement - Accuracy evaluation - Concurrent request handling Key Technologies: - SentenceTransformers for embeddings - FAISS for vector similarity search - SQLite for metadata storage - FastAPI for REST endpoints This PDF should be automatically processed, chunked, embedded, and indexed for immediate searchability across all search modes. Test queries should include: pipeline testing, PDF processing, semantic search, vector embeddings, and performance evaluation.
